data.title: DDOS Protection
data.description: Mitigation strategies in place to prevent Distributed Denial of Service attacks.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Data transmission is secured using TLS encryption standards.

data.title: Identity Management
data.description: Ensures secure access through robust identity management services.
data.technical_spec: Azure Active Directory for Single Sign-On and MFA.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Automated and manual systems in place for detecting and responding to security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Azure Security Center and Microsoft Sentinel for threat detection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine security evaluations to discover and resolve vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Conducted using Azure Security Benchmark and third-party penetration testing.
